events.name: San Antonio Spurs at Milwaukee Bucks

highlights.headline: Spurs clinch at least the 2 seed with win over Bucks
highlights.description: Spurs clinch at least the 2 seed with win over Bucks

tracking.trackingName: COM_NBA Highlight (Spurs clinch at least the 2 seed with win over Bucks) 2026/03/28 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Stephon Castle had a triple-double with 22 points, 10 assists and 10 rebounds as the hot-shooting San Antonio Spurs steamrolled the Milwaukee Bucks 127-95 on Saturday for their eighth consecutive victory.
headlines.shortLinkText: Stephon Castle gets triple-double as Spurs trounce Bucks 127-95 for eighth straight win

video.headline: Spurs clinch at least the 2 seed with win over Bucks

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Detroit Pistons vs. Minnesota Timberwolves: Game Highlights) 2026/03/28 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Tobias Harris led a balanced scoring attack with 18 points on Saturday as the Detroit Pistons strengthened their hold on the top seed in the Eastern Conference with a 109-87 victory over the injury-riddled Minnesota Timberwolves.
headlines.shortLinkText: Harris scores 18, Pistons tighten grip on top seed in the East with a 109-87 win over Minnesota
